top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says tech stocks are losing the qualities that made them the leaders of the rally
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said tech stocks are losing key traits that fueled their leadership since 2023.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
